title: Login button not responding on mobile
description: The login button on the mobile version does not trigger any action when tapped. This occurs on iOS Safari and Chrome for Android.

title: Duplicate of TEST-1
description: Same issue as TEST-1 - login button broken on mobile.

title: API returns 500 on empty payload
description: POST /api/v1/users returns 500 Internal Server Error when the request body is empty. Should return 400 Bad Request with validation errors.

comments.author: claude-agents
comments.text: [agent-flow] Triage completed. Severity: HIGH. Area: API.
